     Guarded by scripts/tests/test_config_reference.py. -->

# Configuration Keys

Complete key-by-key reference for every LINCE configuration file, generated from the published JSON Schemas (`schemas/*.schema.json`). Validate any file with `lince-config validate`; point a TOML LSP (Taplo) at the schemas for editor autocomplete.

## Sandbox configuration (`~/.agent-sandbox/config.toml`)

### Top-level keys

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `extends` | str | ‚Äî | Level fragments only (~/.agent-sandbox/profiles/*.toml): name of the parent fragment to deep-merge on top of |

### `[sandbox]`

Filesystem exposure and backend selection.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `extra_rw` | list[string] | `[]` | Extra directories with read-write access besides the project |
| `ro_dirs` | list[string] | `["~/project"]` | Directories with read-only access |
| `persist_toolchains` | bool | `true` | Persist cargo/npm/go/uv caches between sessions |
| `auto_expose_path` | bool | `true` | Auto-detect $PATH entries under $HOME and expose them read-only |
| `home_ro_dirs` | list[string] | `[".config/gcloud"]` | Extra home subdirectories to expose read-only (relative to $HOME) |
| `default_provider` | str | `""` | Provider used when -P / --provider is not given; empty = none |
| `default_profile` | str | ‚Äî | LEGACY alias of default_provider (pre-#81); run migrate-providers |
| `backend` | str | `"auto"` | "agent-sandbox" (bwrap), "seatbelt" (macOS), "nono" (deprecated), or "auto" |

### `[security]`

Isolation knobs (levels paranoid/normal/permissive preset these via the shipped fragments).

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `unshare_pid` | bool | `true` | PID namespace: hide host processes |
| `new_session` | bool | `false` | New terminal session (anti terminal-escape; may interfere with Ctrl+C) |
| `block_git_push` | bool | `true` | Block git push via a PATH wrapper |
| `credential_proxy` | bool | `false` | Inject API keys on the host side ‚Äî keys never enter the sandbox env |
| `unshare_net` | bool | `false` | Kernel network-namespace isolation (paranoid); egress only via the proxy bridge |
| `allow_domains` | list[string] | `[]` | Extra hosts the credential proxy forwards to (paranoid allowlist) |
| `landlock` | bool | `true` | Landlock hardening layer (#222): kernel fence mirroring the bwrap mounts; false = explicit opt-out (paranoid may then degrade) |
| `allow_connect_ports` | list[integer] | `[]` | Extra TCP ports the agent may connect to (Landlock CONNECT_TCP rules) |
| `allow_bind_ports` | list[integer] | `[]` | TCP ports the agent may bind (Landlock BIND_TCP rules ‚Äî local dev servers) |

### `[credential_proxy]`

Credential-proxy extras.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `blocked_hosts` | list[string] | `[]` | Extra hosts to block (cloud metadata endpoints are always blocked) |

### `[git]`

Sanitized .gitconfig handed to the sandbox.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `strip_sections` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Regex patterns for .gitconfig section headers to strip |
| `overrides` | table | ‚Äî | Values forced in the sanitized gitconfig (dot-notation keys) |

### `[env]`

Environment crossing into the sandbox (clearenv + whitelist model).

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `passthrough` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Host env vars passed through (TERM, ZELLIJ, LINCE_AGENT_ID, ...) |
| `extra` | table | ‚Äî | Extra env vars set inside the sandbox ($VAR values expand against the host env) |

### `[logging]`

Session transcript logging.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `enabled` | bool | `false` | Log transcripts by default (toggle with --log / --no-log) |
| `dir` | str | `"~/.agent-sandbox/logs"` | Log directory |

### `[snapshot]`

Pre-run snapshots for rollback/diff.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `auto_project` | bool | `false` | Snapshot the project dir before each run |
| `auto_config` | bool | `true` | Snapshot the agent config dir before each run |
| `max_project_snapshots` | int | `3` | Project snapshots kept (oldest pruned) |
| `max_config_snapshots` | int | `5` | Config snapshots kept (oldest pruned) |
| `project_exclude` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Directories excluded from project snapshots |

### `[claude]`

Claude-specific knobs (legacy section; prefer [agents.claude] for agent overrides).

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `config_dir` | str | `"~/.agent-sandbox/claude-config"` | Sandbox-isolated copy of the Claude config directory |
| `use_real_config` | bool | `false` | Mount the real ~/.claude directly (skips the isolated copy; disables diff/merge) |

### `[providers.<name>]`

Top-level providers (attributed to claude); prefer the namespaced [<agent>.providers.<name>] form

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `description` | str | ‚Äî | Human-readable label shown by the wizard |
| `env` | table | ‚Äî | Env vars set when this provider is active ($VAR values expand against the host env) |
| `env_unset` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Env vars explicitly unset when active |
| `default_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Override the agent default_args when active |

### `[profiles.<name>]`

LEGACY spelling of [providers.*] (pre-#81); run migrate-providers

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `description` | str | ‚Äî | Human-readable label shown by the wizard |
| `env` | table | ‚Äî | Env vars set when this provider is active ($VAR values expand against the host env) |
| `env_unset` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Env vars explicitly unset when active |
| `default_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Override the agent default_args when active |

### `[agents.<name>]`

Per-agent overrides of the registry defaults (command, default_args, env, home_ro_dirs, home_rw_dirs, bwrap_conflict, disable_inner_sandbox_args, scratch_*)

## Dashboard configuration (`~/.config/lince-dashboard/config.toml`)

### `[dashboard]`

Dashboard behavior and defaults.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `default_provider` | str | ‚Äî | Default provider for new agents |
| `default_profile` | str | ‚Äî | LEGACY alias of default_provider (pre-#81) |
| `sandbox_config_path` | str | `"~/.agent-sandbox/config.toml"` | Path to the sandbox config |
| `default_project_dir` | str | ‚Äî | Default working directory for new agents |
| `default_agent_type` | str | ‚Äî | Agent type preselected by the n shortcut and the N wizard |
| `sandbox_command` | str | `"agent-sandbox"` | Path to the agent-sandbox binary |
| `agent_layout` | `"tiled"` \| `"floating"` | `"tiled"` | How agent panes are created |
| `focus_mode` | `"replace"` \| `"floating"` | `"floating"` | How focusing an agent works |
| `status_method` | `"pipe"` \| `"file"` | `"pipe"` | Status detection method (file polling always runs; pipe is a fast-path) |
| `status_file_dir` | str | `"/tmp/lince-dashboard"` | Directory for per-agent .state files |
| `max_agents` | int | `9` | Maximum concurrent agents |
| `sandbox_backend` | str | ‚Äî | Global backend preference |
| `sandbox_colors` | table | ‚Äî | Color per sandbox level (paranoid/normal/permissive/default) |
| `project_search_roots` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Roots scanned recursively by the wizard's Tab completion |
| `project_search_max_depth` | int | `3` | find -maxdepth for project_search_roots |
| `instance_icons` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Pool of per-instance marker glyphs (#166); empty disables markers |

### `[agents.<name>]`

Agent-type overrides / custom agents (overlay the registry)

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `command` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Legacy fallback command template ({agent_id}, {project_dir}, {provider}); ignored when sandbox_level is set |
| `pane_title_pattern` | str | ‚Äî | Pattern matching Zellij pane titles for reconciliation |
| `status_pipe_name` | str | `"lince-status"` | Zellij pipe name for status messages |
| `display_name` | str | ‚Äî | Full name shown in the UI |
| `short_label` | str | ‚Äî | 3-char label for the table column |
| `color` | str | ‚Äî | ANSI color name |
| `sandboxed` | bool | ‚Äî | Whether the agent runs inside the sandbox |
| `has_native_hooks` | bool | `false` | Agent emits its own status events (no wrapper needed) |
| `home_ro_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | UNUSED by the plugin ‚Äî the sandbox copy is authoritative |
| `home_rw_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | UNUSED by the plugin ‚Äî the sandbox copy is authoritative |
| `bwrap_conflict` | bool | `false` | Agent uses bwrap internally (conflicts with the outer sandbox) |
| `disable_inner_sandbox_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Args disabling the agent's own sandbox |
| `providers` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ["__discover__"] = all discovered providers; [] = skip the provider step; or an explicit list |
| `profiles` | list[string] | ‚Äî | LEGACY alias of providers (pre-#81) |
| `sandbox_backend` | str | ‚Äî | Per-agent backend override (agent-sandbox/seatbelt/nono) |
| `sandbox_level` | str | ‚Äî | Default isolation level in the wizard (paranoid/normal/permissive or custom) |
| `sandbox_levels` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Pin the wizard level picker to this set (shells use ["normal"]) |
| `sandbox_home_subdir` | str | ‚Äî | $HOME subdir rsynced to scratch by the paranoid nono wrapper |
| `env_vars` | table | ‚Äî | Env vars exported at spawn ($VAR self-references inherit from the host env) |
| `event_map` | table | ‚Äî | Agent event name -> canonical status (running/input/permission/stopped) |

## LINCE v2 policy file (`~/.config/lince/lince.toml`)

User intent, versioned, default-deny ‚Äî design config-v2 ¬ß2. Project overlays (<project>/.lince/lince.toml) use the same schema without the version key (¬ß2.4).

### Top-level keys

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `version` | str | ‚Äî | **required** ‚Äî ‚Äî |

### `[network]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `default` | `"deny"` \| `"allow"` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `allowed_hosts` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `blocked_hosts` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[providers.<name>]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `env` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `hosts` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[agents.<name>]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `binary` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `display_name` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `short_label` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `color` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `default_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `level` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `provider` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `allowed_hosts` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `sandbox` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `dashboard` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `variants` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `env` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `event_map` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[filesystem]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `extra_rw` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `ro_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `home_ro_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `home_rw_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[sandbox]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `backend` | `"auto"` \| `"agent-sandbox"` \| `"bwrap"` \| `"nono"` \| `"seatbelt"` \| `"landlock"` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `default_provider` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `persist_toolchains` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `auto_expose_path` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[dashboard]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `max_agents` | int | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `agent_layout` | `"tiled"` \| `"floating"` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `focus_mode` | `"replace"` \| `"floating"` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `enabled_agents` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `default_agent_type` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `default_project_dir` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `default_provider` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `sandbox_command` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `status_file_dir` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `sandbox_colors` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `project_search_roots` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `project_search_max_depth` | int | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `instance_icons` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[experimental]`

Raw mechanism passthroughs (#210). Each active key voids the validated default-deny guarantee VISIBLY: spawn banner + resolve guarantee = 'void:<key>'. Never offered by guided flows.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `landlock` | bool | ‚Äî | Pre-#222 opt-in flag (Landlock now ships enabled by default via [security].landlock) |
| `raw_bwrap_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | Extra bwrap arguments appended LAST to the generated command (expert valve ‚Äî e.g. one extra --bind) |
| `seatbelt_extra` | str | ‚Äî | Seatbelt profile snippet appended verbatim to the generated .sb |
| `permissive_network` | bool | ‚Äî | Required to set [network].default = 'allow' |
| `agents` | table | ‚Äî | Per-agent overrides ‚Äî appended after the global ones |

### `[logging]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `enabled` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `dir` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[snapshot]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `auto_project` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `auto_config` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `max_project_snapshots` | int | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `max_config_snapshots` | int | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `project_exclude` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[git]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `strip_sections` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `overrides` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[trust]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `projects` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Agent registry entries (`registry.d/<agent>.toml`)

One shipped agent (registry.d/<agent>.toml). Shipped data, always overwritten on update ‚Äî design config-v2 ¬ß3.

### `[agent]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `display_name` | str | ‚Äî | **required** ‚Äî ‚Äî |
| `short_label` | str | ‚Äî | **required** ‚Äî ‚Äî |
| `color` | str | ‚Äî | **required** ‚Äî ‚Äî |
| `binary` | str | ‚Äî | **required** ‚Äî ‚Äî |
| `default_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `backend` | `"auto"` \| `"agent-sandbox"` \| `"bwrap"` \| `"nono"` \| `"seatbelt"` \| `"landlock"` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `default_level` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `allowed_levels` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `home_subdir` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `bwrap_conflict` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `disable_inner_sandbox_args` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `home_ro_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `home_rw_dirs` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `levels` | table | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

### `[dashboard]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `status_pipe_name` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `pane_title_pattern` | str | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `has_native_hooks` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `providers` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `command` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `bwrap_conflict` | bool | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Provider table (`registry.d/providers.toml`)

Provider env-var bundles (NAMES, never values) + API hosts ‚Äî design config-v2 ¬ß3.4.

### `[providers.<name>]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `env` | list[string] | ‚Äî | **required** ‚Äî ‚Äî |
| `hosts` | list[string] | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
